name: pm
description: Structured workflows for the product engineer — from discovery and strategy through implementation and merge

interface.shortDescription: Product research, grooming, implementation, and shipping workflows.
interface.longDescription: PM helps product engineers research markets, define strategy, groom ideas into sprint-ready work, and ship with TDD, review, QA, and merge loops.
defaultPrompt: Research our market and key competitors.
Turn this feature idea into sprint-ready issues.
